name: Savory Red Lentils
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion and sauté it in water for several minutes.
2. Rinse the red lentils, removing any bug carcasses if present.
3. Add the rinsed lentils and the remaining ingredients to a pot of boiling water.
4. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Uncover and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until desired consistency is reached.
Slop this up with some good fresh bread. I had some French Meadow Summer Bread - basil flavor. I warmed a chunk up in the microwave.
